## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] `swift test` passes (298+ tests)
- [ ] `swift build -c release` compiles clean
- [ ] New public APIs have DocC documentation
- [ ] New features have unit tests
- [ ] Error messages include `recoverySuggestion`
- [ ] `os.Logger` calls on operation entry/exit/error
- [ ] No force unwraps or force casts
- [ ] No abbreviated names in public API
- [ ] Accessibility identifiers on new UI elements
